query:
UPDATE map_pins 
SET 
  photos = '["https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/113311765/5Wh7ynUieoKvKRb4ttPNaL/pasted_file_vntJpy_IMG_20221006_104107_be0149e4.jpg","https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/113311765/5Wh7ynUieoKvKRb4ttPNaL/IMG_20221001_101158_0f36c7d8.jpg","https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/113311765/5Wh7ynUieoKvKRb4ttPNaL/IMG_20221001_101207_70303def.jpg","https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/113311765/5Wh7ynUieoKvKRb4ttPNaL/IMG_20221001_101214_47287dd6.jpg","https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/113311765/5Wh7ynUieoKvKRb4ttPNaL/IMG_20221001_101228_93b845fd.jpg"]',
  notes = 'Valve assembly at 100,000 gallon water tank near equipment sheds. Deep excavation Oct 2022 to access and service the manifold. Multiple shutoff valves and pipe connections visible. Photos: Oct 1 & Oct 6, 2022.',
  title = '100k Water Tank Valves'
WHERE id = 60001;
command:
